label: PREDICTIVE_STATISTIC
notes: seeded bootstrap 95% CI of mean per-game Brier margin (coinflip_brier - poisson_brier); positive = poisson_team_rate_model improvement over coinflip on the P226-A 2025 run_line test set

label: PREDICTIVE_STATISTIC
notes: one-sided sign-flip paired permutation test p-value; H1: mean Brier margin (coinflip - poisson) > 0; p=(count(permuted_mean>=observed)+1)/(iterations+1)

label: ROBUSTNESS_SUMMARY
notes: 3 of 3 pre-registered chronological train_frac splits (0.5/0.6/0.7) beat coinflip on Brier; consolidated from P228-A split_grid, not recomputed

label: ROBUSTNESS_SUMMARY
notes: 4 of 5 scored monthly rolling windows beat coinflip on Brier (2025-03/2025-04 skipped for insufficient train rows); consolidated from P228-A monthly_windows, not recomputed

label: PREDICTIVE_BASELINE
notes: constant p=0.5, always predicts HOME side; accuracy equals the test-set home-cover base rate by construction, NOT an adaptive baseline

label: REFERENCE_ONLY
notes: descriptive test-set base rate of the more frequent actual side; computed post-hoc from test-set outcomes, NOT a valid pre-registered forward predictive baseline (a safe train-fold majority baseline cannot be computed from existing artifacts without re-deriving per-split labels); presented for descriptive reference only, NOT a betting/edge baseline

label: MODEL
notes: P226-A poisson_team_rate_model test-set accuracy, for side-by-side reference against baselines above
